name: lifeops-board
description: Render conversational schedule updates into a static LifeOps HTML board backed by iCloud JSON, with flexible-task rebalancing and policy-based insights.

interface.shortDescription: Render and rebalance iCloud LifeOps schedules
interface.longDescription: LifeOps Board stores interpreted schedule items in schedule.json, renders a static HTML weekly board, rebalances flexible tasks into open prime, and keeps output/latest.html readable from iPhone Files without requiring JavaScript execution.
defaultPrompt: Use LifeOps Board to initialize my iCloud schedule root.
Use LifeOps Board to add this schedule and refresh output/latest.html.
Use LifeOps Board to rebalance my flexible tasks after this appointment.
Use LifeOps Board to update my LifeOps reference policy.
